metadata.sourceNotes: Source-backed Agios Efstratios pass 2026-05-28: GreeceDestination describes Rodokali as a very small isolated pebble beach south of Trypiti, accessible only by boat; the official local beaches list also includes Rodokali. Confidence lifted to medium; coordinates, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.
